1872800.name: EVE Vanguard
1872800.description:
THE WARCLONE SAGA BEGINS

EVE Vanguard’s Alpha release will focus on high-stakes extraction operations. Brutal, action-filled deployments across a large, hand-crafted map shaped by the aftermath of intergalactic war raging overhead.  

Elite ground troops protect wreckage and corporate-controlled installations, processing facilities and critical planetary infrastructure where advanced technology, lost relics and valuable resources are waiting to be stolen. 

From the moment you deploy, the alarm is raised. The window of opportunity is short - Nemesis is coming. 

NEMESIS HUNTER

Nemesis encounters are brutal, multi-stage boss-fights against flying war machines built to annihilate you. But you are an immortal Warclone, death is just the beginning. Will you risk everything you have and face one down or escape to the stars? 

Return to Avalon to forge stolen tech into specialized weapons and deployables designed to counter the threat. On the ground, coordination is everything: unite with other Warclones, bring the giants down, and extract their tech to fuel the ongoing war. 

ADAPTIVE ARSENAL

Weapons evolve with you. Each gun is modular with multiple fire modes, customized through advanced chipsets.  

And when you close the distance, draw your hand-forged Nova Blade to finish the fight.

WARCLONE LEGACY

Warclones endure aboard Avalon, a vast wandering flotilla hunted through the dark between the stars. 

From its industrial decks, you manufacture weapons and equipment, trade through the Black Market, and launch Expeditions into hostile worlds. 

Here, you decide what your Warclone becomes. Help forge Avalon into a force capable of challenging the Empires. Sell your blade to the highest bidder. Or betray your own kind and hunt alongside the powers that seek your extinction.

AS ABOVE, SO BELOW

Wars in space do not end at orbit. Campaigns in EVE Online influence the battlefields below, and your planetary operations contribute in return.  

Support active war efforts, secure objectives tied to Capsuleer conflicts, and unlock advantages for Vanguard deployments while aiding broader campaigns across New Eden.

THE META IS REAL

Vanguard exists in a persistent universe shaped over decades by millions of players. The wars of EVE Online are real and player-driven. Your actions exist within that same space 

Join the only first-person shooter where your actions echo into the largest sci-fi MMO ever created. 

Enter at the beginning of the Warclone saga and establish your reputation early. Shape the war from day 1 and gain a strategic advantage while the foundations of this conflict are still being laid. 

Now is the time to join the fight.

英语*
